short_description.value: Falcon is a holistic vision-language foundation model for remote sensing, supporting 14 tasks at image, region, and pixel levels. It uses a unified prompt-based architecture and is trained on the large-scale Falcon SFT dataset.

pretraining.value: Unified multi-task instruction tuning on Falcon SFT dataset with dynamic prompt strategy and cross-entropy loss.

value.value: Global (67 remote sensing datasets, multiple continents, urban/rural/varied)

sampling.value: Manual screening and integration of 67 datasets

application.value: Object counting in remote sensing images
Visual question answering for remote sensing
Object detection with horizontal bounding boxes
Object detection with oriented bounding boxes
